creator: andrew@ugh.net.au
text:
Running "man knsupdate" and pressing space a few times produces:

grotty:<standard input> (<standard input>):2298:warning: no final `x stop' command
groff: troff: Signal 6 (core dumped)

There is probably a problem with the knsupdate man page but presumably gruff shouldn't core regardless.


Steps to Reproduce
------------------
Install dns/knot from ports
man knsupdate
Press space at least 4 times. I think the number of presses depends on your terminal size (4 seems to work on 80x24).
